issue_summary: Always keep BKD index off-heap. BKD reader does not implement Accountable any more
javadoc_before: /** Caller must pre-seek the provided {@link IndexInput} to the index location that {@link BKDWriter#finish} returned */
javadoc_after:
/** Caller must pre-seek the provided {@link IndexInput} to the index location that {@link BKDWriter#finish} returned.
   * BKD tree is always stored off-heap. */
